title: Teach For India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Teach For India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Teach For India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Teach For India:
Teach For India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
